chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Fasting

text: 1783 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «نَوْمُ اَلصَّائِمِ عِبَادَةٌ وَ صَمْتُهُ تَسْبِيحٌ وَ عَمَلُهُ مُتَقَبَّلٌ وَ دُعَاؤُهُ مُسْتَجَابٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1783 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The sleep of the fasting person is worship, his silence is glorification, his deeds are accepted, and his supplication is answered."
